requirements.title: Source evidence intake
requirements.description: Preserve drawings, whitepapers, dictated notes, documents, and related artifacts before any summarisation or automation.
acceptance: Raw artifacts are copied into the durable vault.
Each artifact has a digest, source path, kind, and timestamp.
Extracted text remains linked to the raw evidence.

requirements.title: Source-grounded PRD synthesis
requirements.description: Convert evidence dossiers and NotebookLM-style grounded exports into requirements, ambiguities, acceptance criteria, and source references.
acceptance: PRD records source references for every major claim.
Ambiguities are separated from accepted requirements.
Manual exports work before automation is attempted.

requirements.title: GSD2 task bridge
requirements.description: Transform accepted requirements into milestones, vertical slices, tasks, success criteria, and verification commands.
acceptance: Tasks are independently inspectable as JSON and Markdown.
Each task names expected write areas and verification commands.
Tasks preserve requirement traceability.

requirements.title: Bounded execution loop
requirements.description: Plan isolated worktree execution with explicit branch names, gates, stop conditions, and review points.
acceptance: Execution runs are recorded before work begins.
The system can identify planned worktrees and gates.
External mutations remain blocked unless a later approved adapter is enabled.

requirements.title: Playwright UI verification evidence
requirements.description: Generate UI test plans and Playwright skeletons from requirements, with room for screenshots, traces, and healer proposals.
acceptance: Generated tests use role-oriented locators where possible.
Scenario records link back to requirement ids.
Evidence paths are recorded separately from claims.

requirements.title: Review and CI control plane
requirements.description: Collect deterministic checks, CodeRabbit feedback, human review, and merge-readiness state into one evidence surface.
acceptance: Merge readiness lists satisfied and missing gates.
CI and review records are imported without being treated as hidden authority.
Blocked states are explicit.

requirements.title: Infrastructure substrate registry
requirements.description: Represent Proxmox, DGX Spark, M-series Macs, Hermes, OpenScorpion, local model endpoints, and runner pools as read-only registry records first.
acceptance: Infrastructure records are readable without model calls.
Runner trust boundaries are explicit.
Mutation plans require approval and remain non-executing in this slice.

raw.help:
GSD v2.59.0 — Get Shit Done

Usage: gsd [options] [message...]

Options:
  --mode <text|json|rpc|mcp> Output mode (default: interactive)
  --print, -p              Single-shot print mode
  --continue, -c           Resume the most recent session
  --worktree, -w [name]    Start in an isolated worktree (auto-named if omitted)
  --model <id>             Override model (e.g. claude-opus-4-6)
  --no-session             Disable session persistence
  --extension <path>       Load additional extension
  --tools <a,b,c>          Restrict available tools
  --list-models [search]   List available models and exit
  --version, -v            Print version and exit
  --help, -h               Print this help and exit

Subcommands:
  config                   Re-run the setup wizard
  install <source>         Install a package/extension source
  remove <source>          Remove an installed package source
  list                     List installed package sources
  update                   Update GSD to the latest version
  sessions                 List and resume a past session
  worktree <cmd>           Manage worktrees (list, merge, clean, remove)
  auto [args]              Run auto-mode without TUI (pipeable)
  headless [cmd] [args]    Run /gsd commands without TUI (default: auto)

Run gsd <subcommand> --help for subcommand-specific help.

documents.title: Source evidence intake
documents.content:
Preserve drawings, whitepapers, dictated notes, documents, and related artifacts before any summarisation or automation.

- Raw artifacts are copied into the durable vault.
- Each artifact has a digest, source path, kind, and timestamp.
- Extracted text remains linked to the raw evidence.

documents.title: Source-grounded PRD synthesis
documents.content:
Convert evidence dossiers and NotebookLM-style grounded exports into requirements, ambiguities, acceptance criteria, and source references.

- PRD records source references for every major claim.
- Ambiguities are separated from accepted requirements.
- Manual exports work before automation is attempted.

documents.title: GSD2 task bridge
documents.content:
Transform accepted requirements into milestones, vertical slices, tasks, success criteria, and verification commands.

- Tasks are independently inspectable as JSON and Markdown.
- Each task names expected write areas and verification commands.
- Tasks preserve requirement traceability.

documents.title: Bounded execution loop
documents.content:
Plan isolated worktree execution with explicit branch names, gates, stop conditions, and review points.

- Execution runs are recorded before work begins.
- The system can identify planned worktrees and gates.
- External mutations remain blocked unless a later approved adapter is enabled.

documents.title: Playwright UI verification evidence
documents.content:
Generate UI test plans and Playwright skeletons from requirements, with room for screenshots, traces, and healer proposals.

- Generated tests use role-oriented locators where possible.
- Scenario records link back to requirement ids.
- Evidence paths are recorded separately from claims.

documents.title: Review and CI control plane
documents.content:
Collect deterministic checks, CodeRabbit feedback, human review, and merge-readiness state into one evidence surface.

- Merge readiness lists satisfied and missing gates.
- CI and review records are imported without being treated as hidden authority.
- Blocked states are explicit.

documents.title: Infrastructure substrate registry
documents.content:
Represent Proxmox, DGX Spark, M-series Macs, Hermes, OpenScorpion, local model endpoints, and runner pools as read-only registry records first.

- Infrastructure records are readable without model calls.
- Runner trust boundaries are explicit.
- Mutation plans require approval and remain non-executing in this slice.

documents.title: Keep live adapters evidence-first
documents.content:
Roadmap adapters now cover NotebookLM, GSD2, worktree, Playwright, CI, CodeRabbit, infrastructure, and OpenScorpion surfaces.

Keep adapters as file-contract and evidence-record producers until each live integration has an approved mutation or submission path.

- External systems are not mutated by default
- Humans can inspect artifacts before enabling live adapters
- Future work can add narrow approved live connectors
